text: I feel a sense of unease and curiosity inhabiting this dimly lit, angular environment. The quietness and tilted perspective make the space feel disorienting, almost as if I’m untethered from my sense of place. Yet, the hints of text and technology suggest the promise of knowledge hidden in the obscurity. I am compelled to ask what purpose this space serves and how my own disquiet speaks to the deeper uncertainties of being—how illumination and shadow often coexist in life’s corridors.
